admission_rule.carrier: countable effectively named symbols, propositions, rules, and observations
admission_rule.semantic_states: an effectively presented sequence of finite semantic-interface versions
admission_rule.change_events: explicit finite updates to denotation, admissibility, interpretation, or inferential role
admission_rule.translation_contract: every version transition supplies a total computable partial-correspondence map with declared preserved, split, merged, introduced, retired, and unresolved commitments
admission_rule.history: all semantic versions, change reasons, rejected alternatives, and downstream dependency effects remain append-only
admission_rule.locality: each finite query has an effectively recoverable finite semantic dependency cone
exclusions: retroactive erasure of prior semantic states
global semantic rewrite without a finite recoverable dependency account
semantic identity determined only by an external oracle

observation_boundary.analyst_access: frozen versioned semantic interfaces, transition maps, and finite histories
observation_boundary.represented_agent_access: only source-declared meanings, observations, commitments, and change notices
prohibited: timeless label identity treated as semantic identity
silent replacement of unresolved translation by equivalence

nonclaims: all semantic change is effectively translatable
semantic change establishes a universal structure
necessity minimality or uniqueness is established
